icon: $#rfkill list wifi | grep -q 'Soft blocked: yes' && echo 󰤮 || echo 󰤢
command: rfkill toggle wifi; rfkill list wifi | grep -q 'Soft blocked: yes' && notify-send -r 999 -i /usr/share/icons/Cosmic/scalable/status/network-wireless-disconnected-symbolic.svg 'Wi-Fi' 'Disabled' || notify-send -r 999 -i /usr/share/icons/Cosmic/scalable/status/network-wireless-signal-excellent-symbolic.svg 'Wi-Fi' 'Enabled'
